ab: omikiyae ta kaeaea taka ’aolai, alracedha ’a taotao, mene caili otahamangele la kaeaea caili.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫taotao，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is taotao, he is 11 years old.

ab: ta’aelrenai miki ta kaeaea gako solasolate.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.
Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madhalamelrao longolangoi, lo taivalrivalriyae, cekelaenai dha’ananae moa longolangoi.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: madhalamelrao tova’oae la’ivoko, odholromao ta’aelre omale la longolangoi.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
